subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken on 1909-02-23
subcodes.first_line: ...diversity is really harmony. If our food were to be all of one kind it would become monotonous. So in many ways the existence of different degrees is in reality the perfection of harmony
subcodes.subjects: @diversity of thought and belief, @unity in diversity, @differences in human capacity, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @diversity an attribute; requirement of existence
